title: Jaan Se Pyaara
subTitle: Inspector Jai balances working as a cop with taking care of his mother and a brother with developmental disabilities. But when he arrests a local don, he starts to fear for his family's safety.

title: Baat Bann Gayi
subTitle: Kabir falls in love with Rachna, but he must impress her brother, Professor Laxmi Nivas, to get her hand in marriage. Things turn upside down when his lookalike shows up.

title: Aulad
subTitle: A struggling couple loses both their sons when one is given up for adoption and the other flees after finding himself in trouble.

title: Geet
subTitle: After losing her ability to sing, Neha, a famous star, relocates to a small village. While she attempts to get back her voice, she encounters Rajesh, who decides to help her.

title: Geet
subTitle: After losing her ability to sing, Neha, a famous star, relocates to a small village. While she attempts to get back her voice, she encounters Rajesh, who decides to help her.

title: China Gate
subTitle: Colonel Puri requests his former fellow army officers court-martialed in disgrace to redeem themselves by rescuing a village from Jageera, an evil bandit.

title: Aakhri Ghulam
subTitle: Bheema and his family live under the tyranny of their master, Daulat Singh. But, when Bheema revolts, his love for his master's daughter is threatened.

title: Sirf Tum
subTitle: Deepak and Aarti fall in love with each other without ever meeting each other. Later, Aarti sets out to look for him in the city of Delhi.

title: Avtaar
subTitle: Avtaar leads a happy life with his wife, Radha, and his sons, Chander and Ramesh. However, consumed by their greed and ambitions, Avtaar's sons betray him but he soon reaches new heights of success.

title: Daraar
subTitle: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy man, falls for Priya. However, things get complicated when Vikram, Priya's abusive husband, enters the frame.

title: Daraar
subTitle: Raj Malhotra, a wealthy man, falls for Priya. However, things get complicated when Vikram, Priya's abusive husband, enters the frame.

title: Star
subTitle: Dev belongs to a middle class family and dreams of becoming a music sensation like his icon Elvis Presley. However, his reality forces him to give up on his dream until he finds a job at Charlie's disco.

title: Nazar Ke Samne
subTitle: Jai, an unemployed drunk, gives false testimony that puts an innocent man in jail for murder. However, he later relents and tries to exonerate him by searching for the real killer.

title: Hatya: The Murder
subTitle: Ravi's father, Ratan, gets killed when he refuses to sell his land to Murugan, a wealthy businessman. Later, Ravi sets out to avenge the death of his father.

title: Mafia Raaj
subTitle: An honest police officer has a mission to wipe out a mafia group. But in the process, he is forced to sacrifice not only his father but also his sister.

title: Platform
subTitle: Vikram and Raju are brothers who work in a restaurant. When a conniving person frames Vikram in a murder case and separates them, circumstances lead Raju to a life of crime.

title: Khatron Ke Khiladi
subTitle: Balwant, a truck driver, is driven into the underworld as he wants to take revenge on the owners of the trucking company for the death of his brother.

title: Loafer
subTitle: Ravi, an unemployed man who constantly gets into fights, is framed for the murder of a gangster. With no support from his family, he must now fight to prove his innocence.

title: Baadshah
subTitle: An amateur detective, Raj, goes by the nickname of Baadshah. But this name soon causes a misunderstanding that lands him in the middle of a conspiracy to assassinate the chief minister of Goa.

title: Baadshah
subTitle: An amateur detective, Raj, goes by the nickname of Baadshah. But this name soon causes a misunderstanding that lands him in the middle of a conspiracy to assassinate the chief minister of Goa.

title: Ranbanka
subTitle: Rahul, an ordinary engineer, comes to Mathura with his wife and son. However, when a gangster gets attracted to his wife and forces her to marry him, he tries to find a way to stop his advances.

title: Zubeidaa
subTitle: Brought up by his maternal grandmother, Riyaz is on a determined quest to find and understand his mother. His search ultimately takes him on the complex journey his mother went through.

title: Sultanat
subTitle: Sultan, a brave warrior, tries to win the affections of Yasmin, a beautiful woman. However, his life turns upside down when his father is killed by a general, whom he swears revenge against.

title: Haisiyat
subTitle: Ram, a union leader, falls in love with the factory's new owner, Sita. However, management disputes create complications in their relationship.

title: Parivaar
subTitle: When a young girl is thrown out of her home by her evil relatives, she finds shelter with a poor street performer and his two children, a dog and a monkey.

title: Teri Meherbaniyan
subTitle: Ram, an honest man, falls in love with a woman named Bijli and goes on to help the people of her village. However, the region's corrupt leader, Thakur Vijay Singh, soon begins to plot against him.

title: Phool Aur Kaante
subTitle: Love leads Ajay down a new path when he is expected to inherit his father's criminal empire, bringing along perils that could either tear their family apart or solidify their bond.

title: Aakhri Ghulam
subTitle: Bheema and his family live under the tyranny of their master, Daulat Singh. But, when Bheema revolts, his love for his master's daughter is threatened.
